questions.clue: Alexander Pope:"A little Jeopardy! is a dangerous thing"
Christopher Marlowe:"Come live with me, and be my Jeopardy!"
Alfred, Lord Tennyson:"Half a Jeopardy!, half a Jeopardy!, half a Jeopardy! onward"
Samuel Taylor Coleridge:"Instead of the cross, the Jeopardy! about my neck was hung"
Robert Herrick:"Gather ye Jeopardy! while ye may"
